title: Agent Semantic Client Receipt
description: agent semantic client execution receipt for route selection, cache status, provider command counts, native-provider provenance, and captured provider stream metrics. In --receipt-json transport, provider stdout remains the prompt stream and provider stderr is recorded as byte counts instead of being mixed into the JSON receipt stream.

cacheStatus.description: Machine routing/cache state for the execution. For method=cache-status, use cacheManifestStatus and clientDbStatus for manifest/DB health; the prompt line owns the human status spelling.

providerCommands.description: Provider command executions captured by the client. Each entry is registry-owned and records argv plus stream byte counts without embedding provider stdout or stderr content.

eventTimestampMs.description: Preferred receipt event timestamp as Unix epoch milliseconds. Artifact history importers use this before falling back to file modification time.

startedAtMs.description: Optional receipt start timestamp as Unix epoch milliseconds.

endedAtMs.description: Optional receipt end timestamp as Unix epoch milliseconds.

syntaxArtifactId.description: semantic-tree-sitter-query artifact id used or written by a query route, when syntax ABI replay is involved.

syntaxQueryAstAbiFingerprint.description: Stable fingerprint of the normalized tree-sitter-compatible query AST/ABI that participates in syntax-query cache identity.

syntaxQueryGrammarId.description: Tree-sitter grammar id from the semantic-tree-sitter-query packet used by syntax-query cache identity.

syntaxQueryGrammarProfileVersion.description: Grammar profile version from the semantic-tree-sitter-query packet used by syntax-query cache identity.

syntaxQuerySelector.description: Exact selector component from the semantic-tree-sitter-query packet when present; query --code remains pure stdout and selector metadata belongs in the receipt.

packetBytes.description: Size in bytes of the validated provider packet or replayed artifact packet when available.

sqliteReadCount.description: Count of logical local SQLite read operations for this client request when the local cache backend was consulted. This is an observability counter, not a SQL statement or row-count ABI.

sqliteWriteCount.description: Count of logical local SQLite write/import operations for this client request. This is an observability counter, not a SQL statement or row-count ABI.

stderrBytes.description: Total provider stderr bytes captured across provider commands. This is not the JSON receipt stream length.

cacheRoot.description: Resolved agent semantic client cache root when this receipt inspected local cache state.

cacheManifestPath.description: Resolved cache manifest path when this receipt inspected local cache state.

cacheManifestStatus.description: Filesystem and validation status for the cache manifest inspected by this receipt.

cacheGenerationCount.description: Number of cache generations visible in the inspected manifest, or zero when missing/unavailable.

rawSourceStored.description: Diagnostic flag indicating whether the inspected cache manifest reports raw source storage. Valid cache manifests must keep this false, but receipts may report true when diagnosing an invalid manifest.

clientDbPath.description: Resolved SQLite client database path when this receipt inspected local cache DB state.

clientDbStatus.description: Filesystem and schema status for the local SQLite client database inspected by this receipt.

clientDbGenerationCount.description: Number of cache generations visible in the local SQLite client database.

clientDbSyntaxRowGenerationCount.description: Number of normalized semantic-tree-sitter-query generation rows visible in the local SQLite client database.

clientDbSyntaxRowMatchCount.description: Number of normalized semantic-tree-sitter-query match rows visible in the local SQLite client database.

clientDbSyntaxRowCaptureCount.description: Number of normalized semantic-tree-sitter-query capture rows visible in the local SQLite client database.

clientDbStructuralIndexGenerationCount.description: Number of structural index generations visible in the local SQLite client database.

clientDbStructuralIndexOwnerCount.description: Number of structural index owner rows visible in the local SQLite client database.

clientDbStructuralIndexSymbolCount.description: Number of structural index symbol rows visible in the local SQLite client database.

clientDbStructuralIndexDependencyUsageCo.description: Number of structural index dependency-usage rows visible in the local SQLite client database.

clientDbSourceIndexGenerationCount.description: Number of source-index generations visible in the local SQLite client database.

clientDbSourceIndexOwnerCount.description: Number of source-index owner rows visible in the local SQLite client database.

clientDbSourceIndexSelectorCount.description: Number of source-index selector rows visible in the local SQLite client database.

clientDbArtifactEventCount.description: Number of DB artifact event rows visible in the local SQLite client database.

clientDbRawSourceStored.description: Diagnostic flag indicating whether the local SQLite client database contains cache rows marked as raw-source storage.

clientDbJournalMode.description: Observed SQLite journal_mode for the local client database when runtime pragmas were inspected. WAL-capable writable cache connections should report wal.

clientDbSynchronous.description: Observed SQLite synchronous pragma value for the local client database when runtime pragmas were inspected.

clientDbBusyTimeoutMs.description: Observed SQLite busy_timeout value in milliseconds for the local client database when runtime pragmas were inspected.

clientDbForeignKeys.description: Observed SQLite foreign_keys pragma for the local client database when runtime pragmas were inspected.

dbEngine.description: Structured DB Engine state for analyzer-facing receipts. backend=sqlite-v1 is a transition adapter while futureBackend=turso records the replacement direction.

stderrBytes.description: Provider stderr bytes captured for this command. In --receipt-json transport, these bytes are not replayed into stderr.

stdoutSha256.description: SHA-256 digest of full provider stdout bytes before retained-buffer truncation.

stderrSha256.description: SHA-256 digest of full provider stderr bytes before retained-buffer truncation.

stdoutTruncated.description: Whether provider stdout was truncated in the retained buffer.

stderrTruncated.description: Whether provider stderr was truncated in the retained buffer.

timedOut.description: Whether the provider process exceeded its configured timeout and was killed.

eventTimestampMs.description: Preferred provider command event timestamp as Unix epoch milliseconds. Artifact history importers use this before packet-level timestamps or file modification time.

startedAtMs.description: Optional provider command start timestamp as Unix epoch milliseconds.

endedAtMs.description: Optional provider command end timestamp as Unix epoch milliseconds.
